# Anurag Mobile Repairing Centre

> Expert mobile phone repair with real-time online tracking, genuine parts, and secure online payments.

Anurag Mobile Repairing Centre is a local mobile, tablet, and laptop repair service. Customers can book a repair online, track their device's repair status in real time using a tracking ID, and pay securely once the device is ready.

## Pages
- [Home – Track Repair Status](/): Enter a tracking ID to see real-time repair progress.
- [Book Your Repair Assistance](/book-repair): Online booking form for screen, battery, charging port, software and other device repairs.

## Optional
- [Contact](https://anuragmobile.in/contact): Phone, email, and shop address.
- [Services](https://anuragmobile.in/services): Full list of repair services offered.
